since_last: 49% of 84 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.78%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.43% · BTC -0.72% · Gold +0.41% · Nasdaq100 +1.72%. 49% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.78%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.78%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.28%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at +31.80%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +31.80%, INOD +10.82%, TLN +7.88%, MU +6.97%, ARM +6.37%. Laggards: SOUN -5.25%, SMR -5.22%, APP -4.61%, KLAC -3.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +31.80% at $212.14
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +31.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
